title: Production Dashboard And Analyst Triage Upgrade
changes: Unified the header, navigation, and overall SaaS dashboard styling into a cleaner production workbench.
Moved the validation queue into its own review tab and improved queue status pills and analyst workflow separation.
Added richer expert findings and session-priority ranking so the highest-value investigation target surfaces first.
Improved visualization readability with larger ladder, graph, and causal canvases, centered ladder layout, stronger scanability, and better graph legibility.
Refined typography, panel hierarchy, and interaction behavior to reduce clutter and make the RCA workspace easier to read.

title: Learning Control And Platform Visibility
changes: Added one-click learning from a user-specified PCAP folder.
Added learning status, up-to-date detection, learned PCAP count, and unique pattern count in the UI.
Added footer version number with clickable improvement history.
Hardened tshark extraction by filtering unsupported field definitions per environment.
Added SCTP transport parsing for better control-plane visibility.

title: Self-Learning RCA Intelligence
changes: Added persistent knowledge base, vector search, compaction engine, and skill export.
Added hybrid RCA scoring using rules, pattern similarity, and anomaly signals.
Added context-aware learning with validation queue and pattern reinforcement.
Added lightweight explainability narrative generation for hybrid RCA.

title: Analyst Workbench Overhaul
changes: Reworked UI into an analyst-style RCA workbench.
Added richer capture analytics, protocol intelligence, endpoint views, and RCA summaries.
Made call flow and graph views session-aware and protocol-agnostic.

title: Multi-Protocol Correlation Expansion
changes: Expanded protocol coverage across 2G, 3G, LTE/4G, 5G, IMS, MAP, PFCP, HTTP, TCP, and UDP.
Improved session correlation so ladder and graph group multi-protocol session messages together.
Added trace details summaries including likely A-party, B-party, and call or transaction type.

title: Production Hardening
changes: Added app factory, config-driven runtime behavior, safer upload handling, and health endpoints.
Improved model loading, packaging, testing, and operational safety for production use.
